system.description: You can now use Unspool on mundane living targets. When used to target people instead of objects, roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the target loses resistance to their emotions: whatever is their most pressing concern becomes the whole of their mind. Annoyance becomes fury; regret becomes grief; anxiety becomes terror.
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one:
  • Your range increases by three meters.
  • Any number of people within your current range undergo this effect.
  • You pick the emotion that heightens within them rather than what’s most pressing.
outcomes.failure:
things fall apart wherever you go: the person you accidentally tripped holds a murderous grudge, exes won’t stop calling, simple advice is followed too seriously. The GM receives the following Chaos ability until the Mission is over:

Unstable (1 Chaos) - Someone responds emotionally in an outsized way that inconveniences the player who gave you this ability.
